headline: Ukraine-Russia-US Trilateral Peace Talks Planned for Abu Dhabi
summary: Ukrainian President Zelensky announced a new round of trilateral peace talks between Ukraine, Russia, and the United States, expected to take place in Abu Dhabi in early March 2026. The discussions are aimed at finalizing security guarantees and resolving key outstanding issues related to the ongoing Russia-Ukraine conflict. No ceasefire or agreement has been confirmed at this stage — talks are still in the planning phase.

secondary_markets.name: Lockheed Martin
secondary_markets.reason: Progress toward peace negotiations reduces near-term demand expectations for US defense systems supplied to Ukraine.

secondary_markets.name: Rheinmetall AG
secondary_markets.reason: Any credible peace process dampens European rearmament urgency and reduces ammunition/vehicle procurement momentum.

secondary_markets.name: Natural Gas (TTF)
secondary_markets.reason: Diplomatic progress raises the possibility of partial restoration of Russian gas flows to Europe, pressuring European gas prices.

secondary_markets.name: Brent Crude Oil
secondary_markets.reason: De-escalation prospects reduce geopolitical risk premium embedded in oil prices tied to the Russia-Ukraine conflict.

secondary_markets.name: BAE Systems
secondary_markets.reason: Reduced conflict intensity outlook softens the urgency of UK-sourced artillery and armored vehicle contracts for Ukraine.

trade_position: Short TTF natural gas futures via the front-month contract — the single most asymmetric play here is the re-pricing of European energy risk premium if talks advance; even preliminary ceasefire language could trigger a sharp selloff in gas prices that remain elevated partly on conflict-driven supply uncertainty. Pair with a long position in European airline stocks (e.g. Lufthansa LHA.DE) as a re-routing and fuel-cost beneficiary of reduced Eastern European airspace disruption.

messages.text_en:
#Ukraine #USA #Russia 

Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has announced that a new round of trilateral peace talks involving Russia, Ukraine, and the United States is expected to take place in Abu Dhabi in early March. These discussions aim to finalize security guarantees and address key issues related to the ongoing conflict.
